description: Rewrite 5 fake QuantAI components from object-tree format to real React JSX with Tailwind CSS: ChatInterface, DevicePreview, EcosystemMap, ModelCard, PluginCard.
steps: Read apps/quantai/src/types/index.ts to understand ConversationMessage, AIModel, Device, Plugin, etc.

Rewrite apps/quantai/src/components/ChatInterface.tsx: Convert to JSX chat UI with message list (user/AI avatars, tool call chips, attachment chips, metadata), typing indicator, and input bar with attach/send buttons.
Rewrite apps/quantai/src/components/DevicePreview.tsx: Convert to JSX device preview/display component.
Rewrite apps/quantai/src/components/EcosystemMap.tsx: Convert to JSX ecosystem visualization component.
Rewrite apps/quantai/src/components/ModelCard.tsx: Convert to JSX model info card with name, provider, capabilities tags, specs (context window, latency, cost), and fine-tuned badge.
Rewrite apps/quantai/src/components/PluginCard.tsx: Convert to JSX plugin card component.
Verify: Run `pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/quantai` passes with 0 errors.
acceptance_criteria: All 5 QuantAI files return JSX (not object trees)
grep -n "type: 'div'" across all 5 files returns 0 matches
All files maintain their original Props interfaces
All files use Tailwind CSS classes
Export structure preserved (named export + default export)
findings: All 5 components converted cleanly. DevicePreview onType param prefixed with underscore for noUnusedParameters. EcosystemMap uses useMemo for position calculations. Typecheck passed on first try.
